name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_srapc_uvw_customerrequest_all_attributes
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_srapc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_customerrequest_all_attributes' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`Created By User` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Created Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Completed Date ` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date/Time_Received_Text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date/Time_Acknowledged_Text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date/Time_Resolved_Text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Close_Out_Date/Time_Text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Event_Response_Time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Event_Resolution_Time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Event_Closure_Time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Commitment Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date/Time_Received` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date/Time_Acknowledged` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date/Time_Resolved` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Close_Out_Date/Time` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`Created By User` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Created Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Completed Date ` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date/Time_Received_Text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date/Time_Acknowledged_Text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date/Time_Resolved_Text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Close_Out_Date/Time_Text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Event_Response_Time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Event_Resolution_Time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Event_Closure_Time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Commitment Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date/Time_Received` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date/Time_Acknowledged` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date/Time_Resolved` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Close_Out_Date/Time` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Created By User|Created Date|Completed Date |Date/Time_Received_Text|Date/Time_Acknowledged_Text|Date/Time_Resolved_Text|Close_Out_Date/Time_Text|Event_Response_Time|Event_Resolution_Time|Event_Closure_Time|Commitment Date|Date/Time_Received|Date/Time_Acknowledged|Date/Time_Resolved|Close_Out_Date/Time' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_srapc`.`uvw_customerrequest_all_attributes`
